\tzpentry{ID4397}{Quantum State Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4397 introduces Quantum State Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{O}_{\TZP} \sim \sum_{p \in \mathcal{P}} \int\!\!\int \mathrm{d}x_1 \mathrm{d}x_2\; f_p(x_1,x_2)\, \hat{\Psi}_p^\dagger(x_1,x_2) \hat{\Psi}_p(x_1,x_2), \end{equation}
